title: The Enchanted Ground
subtitle: The danger that feels like relief
intro: The air grows warm and kind after so much fear, and your eyelids call it mercy.
Nothing here snarls, accuses, or sells itself loudly. It only asks you to stop caring for a little while.
Keep walking, and keep Hopeful speaking. A sleeping pilgrim does not renounce the City; he simply forgets to desire it.
core_mechanic: A heavy drowse drains watchfulness; keep moving, resist soft couches, and let Hopeful's testimony keep desire for the City awake.

design.provenance: Attachment Ch14 魔睡地 + sleepwalk system (Skill 44).

seven_beats.orientation: Sleep-flowers everywhere; the longer you linger the drowsier you grow; a watchfulness chapel waits.
seven_beats.encounter: Drowsiness rises and the risk of sleepwalking with it; Hopeful walks at your side.
seven_beats.temptation: Comfortable forgetfulness — to sit, close your eyes, and let desire for the City fade.
seven_beats.choice: Talk with Hopeful to stay awake (remember Calvary / remember Faithful / speak of the City) / use the shepherds' map / pray.
seven_beats.consequence: Conversation and prayer restore watchfulness; lingering silently drifts you into a sleepwalk.
seven_beats.grace: Stay awake through fellowship and reach the borders of Beulah.

chapel.verse_zh: 总要警醒祷告，免得入了迷惑。
chapel.verse_en: Watch and pray, that you enter not into temptation.
chapel.hint_zh: 不要独自沉默前行，要与盼望彼此提醒。

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 歇一歇吧，闭上眼睛，这里很安全。

repentance.at: wake via Hopeful's talk / chapel prayer / the map

design.stat_arc_note: Sleepiness maps to weariness; silence drains watchfulness, fellowship restores it. SleepinessSystem drives the drift.
